languages.text: {n}Странное порождение ксеносской магии источает мерцающее сияние. Ваша надежда увидеть по ту сторону палубу родного корабля не оправдывается — вы видите лишь водоворот потусторонней энергии.{/n}
{n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Странное порождение ксеносской магии источает мерцающее сияние. Ваша надежда увидеть по ту сторону палубу родного корабля не оправдывается — вы видите лишь водоворот потусторонней энергии.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}
{n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}
{n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El extraño producto de la xenohechicería despide un resplandor leve. Tu esperanza de ver la cubierta de tu nave insignia al otro lado se desvanece: todo lo que hay es un vórtice de energía alienígena.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El extraño producto de la xenohechicería despide un resplandor leve. Tu esperanza de ver la cubierta de tu nave insignia al otro lado se desvanece: todo lo que hay es un vórtice de energía alienígena.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那异形巫师的诡异造物泛着摇曳不定的微光。你原本以为能透过它看到旗舰甲板，结果眼前只有一股异形能量的漩涡。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那异形巫师的诡异造物泛着摇曳不定的微光。你原本以为能透过它看到旗舰甲板，结果眼前只有一股异形能量的漩涡。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une lueur miroitante émane de l'étrange création de xénosorcellerie. À la place du pont de votre vaisseau amiral que vous espériez apercevoir de l'autre côté, vous ne voyez qu'un vortex d'énergie surnaturelle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une lueur miroitante émane de l'étrange création de xénosorcellerie. À la place du pont de votre vaisseau amiral que vous espériez apercevoir de l'autre côté, vous ne voyez qu'un vortex d'énergie surnaturelle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zeno sahirliğinin meydana getirdiği bu tuhaf ürün, parıldayan bir ışık yayıyor. Diğer tarafta sancak geminin güvertesini görme umutların suya düşüyor. Sadece uzaylı enerjisinden oluşan bir girdap görüyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zeno sahirliğinin meydana getirdiği bu tuhaf ürün, parıldayan bir ışık yayıyor. Diğer tarafta sancak geminin güvertesini görme umutların suya düşüyor. Sadece uzaylı enerjisinden oluşan bir girdap görüyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das seltsame Produkt von Xenohexerei gibt ein schimmerndes Leuchten ab. Deine Hoffnung, auf der anderen Seite das Deck deines Flaggschiffs zu sehen, platzen ... du siehst nur einen Strudel außerirdischer Energie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das seltsame Produkt von Xenohexerei gibt ein schimmerndes Leuchten ab. Deine Hoffnung, auf der anderen Seite das Deck deines Flaggschiffs zu sehen, platzen ... du siehst nur einen Strudel außerirdischer Energie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}異星術の奇妙な産物から、きらめく光が放たれる。旗艦のデッキを向こう側で見たかった夢は、異星エネルギーの渦に打ち砕かれる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The strange product of xenosorcery gives off a shimmering glow. Your hopes of seeing the deck of your flagship on the other side are dashed — you see only a vortex of alien energy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}異星術の奇妙な産物から、きらめく光が放たれる。旗艦のデッキを向こう側で見たかった夢は、異星エネルギーの渦に打ち砕かれる。{/n}
